message:
web: Fix transcript list image sizing and avatar flicker

- Constrain preview image height with max-h-22 to prevent container growth
- Remove self-stretch from preview image
- Replace Avatar component with plain img to eliminate loading flicker
- Remove unused Avatar imports and getInitials function

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/u8rjiuu25jjkrrs7wyz0yrxy
